scenarios.description: charset(html, updateMetaCharset=true, meta[charset] absent, obsolete meta[name=charset] present) appends new meta[charset] and removes obsolete
scenarios.precondition: Document shell with head containing only <meta name="charset">
scenarios.expectedResult: New <meta charset> added and obsolete <meta name=charset> removed; outputSettings.charset updated
pseudocode: TEST TC11 charset appends and removes in HTML when obsolete only
// A new meta[charset] is created with ISO-8859-5

scenarios.description: charset(xml, updateMetaCharset=true, first child is XmlDeclaration with non-xml name) prepends new xml declaration
scenarios.precondition: Document(new) with syntax=xml, updateMetaCharset=true, first child XmlDeclaration named "notxml"
scenarios.expectedResult: A new XmlDeclaration named 'xml' prepended with version=1.0 and encoding set; original decl pushed to second position
pseudocode: TEST TC12 charset prepends when first XmlDeclaration has wrong name
// New xml declaration is at index 0
// Original wrong-named declaration is now second
